activities_projects.title: Behavioral Psychology Study
activities_projects.objective: Analyze Mijbil’s behavior using principles of animal psychology.
steps: Select 4 behaviors of Mijbil described in the chapter
Research psychological reasons for each behavior in otters or similar animals
Write a detailed comparative analysis linking text and psychology
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will connect literary observation with scientific understanding of animal behavior.
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of analysis, clarity, and research support

activities_projects.title: Critical Character Study
activities_projects.objective: Examine the development of Mijbil’s character through events.
steps: Identify key turning points in Mijbil’s life as described
Analyze how each event shaped his personality and habits
Write a structured essay with textual examples
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will enhance critical thinking and literary analysis skills.

activities_projects.title: Comparative Study – Pet vs Wild Animal
activities_projects.objective: Compare Mijbil’s behavior with that of a wild animal.
steps: Choose a wild animal to study
List similarities and differences in behaviors and adaptability
Write a comparative essay linking observations to the story
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will develop research, analytical, and comparative skills.
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy, depth, and clarity of comparison

activities_projects.title: Ethical Reflection Essay
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate human responsibilities when keeping wild animals as pets.
steps: Analyze the ethical implications of keeping Mijbil as a pet
Discuss potential challenges and risks for both animal and owner
Write a structured essay with reasoned arguments
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will develop ethical reasoning and structured essay writing skills.
activities_projects.evaluation: Logic, depth, and clarity of argument

activities_projects.title: Symbolism and Metaphor Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Identify literary devices representing freedom, curiosity, and companionship.
steps: Identify metaphors and symbolic descriptions in the chapter
Explain their purpose and effect on reader perception
Write a report with textual evidence and analysis
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will strengthen literary analysis and interpretive skills.
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy, depth, and clarity of analysis

activities_projects.title: Behavior Prediction Experiment
activities_projects.objective: Predict animal behavior in unfamiliar situations.
steps: Identify an event not described in the story (e.g., Mijbil in a new environment)
Predict how Mijbil might behave based on observed traits
Justify predictions with reasoning and textual evidence
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will apply observation and reasoning to predict outcomes.
activities_projects.evaluation: Logical reasoning, justification, and textual support

activities_projects.title: Research Presentation – Otters Around the World
activities_projects.objective: Explore scientific knowledge of otters and relate to Mijbil.
steps: Research habitat, diet, and social behavior of otters
Compare findings with Mijbil’s behavior
Prepare and present a visual report or slide presentation
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will link literature with real-world biological studies and presentation skills.
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy, presentation quality, and connection to the story

activities_projects.title: Narrative Techniques Critique
activities_projects.objective: Analyze how the author narrates Mijbil’s story.
steps: Identify narrative perspective, tone, and style
Discuss how it influences reader understanding of Mijbil
Write a critique with examples from the text
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will strengthen literary critique and analytical skills.

activities_projects.title: Ethical Campaign Design
activities_projects.objective: Promote responsible pet ownership through a campaign.
steps: Design a campaign encouraging awareness about keeping wild animals as pets
Include slogans, visuals, and key messages
Present the campaign to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will develop ethical awareness, creativity, and communication skills.

activities_projects.title: Analytical Essay – Human-Animal Bond
activities_projects.objective: Critically evaluate the relationship between Mijbil and the author.
steps: Describe the interactions and mutual influence between Mijbil and the author
Analyze the emotional and practical significance of their bond
Write an analytical essay connecting observations to broader themes of companionship
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will enhance critical thinking, analytical writing, and understanding of human-animal relationships.
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of analysis, textual support, and organization
